entry.title: Re: Dual control sensitive fields for vendor master in sap
entry.content: Edit the tag as Topic Expert

entry.title: Re: Can we restrict some Web Services ID for External Catalog in Manage Purchase Requisition - Pro a
entry.content: remove the Asset related tag.

entry.title: Re: Update primary & secondary email for an user in Succe...
entry.content:
Hi Everyone,

Just to help wider audience, I have found the solution. Seems we can't bundle OData payload from IDM however I did it logically -

1. Stored personal email from SF in one of the custom IDM attribute.

2. While updating records in SF - In 1st custom pass, used parameter "purgeType = full" in header request and in payload passed Business email, this will remove anything that is ContactInformation portlet related to email in SF and update Business email as primary.

3. In second custom pass, used parameter "purgeType = incremental" and updated personal email that was stored in IDM attribute of user as secondary.

entry.title: Re: Can we restrict some Web Services ID for External Cat...
entry.content:
Hi @aoime02,

This feature is not supported in current version now.

entry.title: Re: Prevent editing of key value in Fiori Elements object...
entry.content:
Hello I can see you found the solution your self however i'm aware of an easier way to prevented the editing of a certain field when in update screen by adding the below in the behavior definitions interface.

field ( readonly : update ) FieldName;

Hope this helps.

Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Want to merge transaction line in SAC model based on...
entry.content: can you provide a script for this?

entry.title: Re: Migration key date need to change
entry.content:
This issue is happening because the status for the migration key date must be set back to “ongoing” as the screenshot as I could see.

To Change the date, the status for the migration key date must be set back to “In Preparation” to change the date. Afterwards, for running the migration the status must be switched to “ongoing”. 

Please refer to the KBA ##2754615 - SAP S/4HANA Migration Cockpit: Information about Posting Date / Migration Key Date for your reference.

entry.title: Retrospective activation of actual costing possible without restrictions / problems?
entry.content:
Hello,

From a technical perspective... Is it better to introduce actual costing from the start on or is the activation later in a live system possible without restrictions? Any recommendations or topics to consider? We are on S/4HANA OP 2021 in a rollout. Maybe an upgrade to a more recent release/version would be helpful. Any thoughts?

Thank you!

entry.title: change of Session timeout settings ? Do you recommend ??
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

Has anyone attempted to change the session timeout from 30 minutes? Is this feasible and recommended? Currently, the system issues a warning message after 20 minutes of inactivity and logs out after an additional 10 minutes. We want to change it to  if the session is inactive for 10 minutes, a warning message should appear, and if no action is taken, the system should log off after 5 minutes. Is this possible? Any SAP recommendation guides or documents would be helpful.

Thanks

Archie

entry.title: Re: @sap/datasphere-cli: Getting Rid of Passcodes Thanks to OAuth Client Support
entry.content:
Hello @jascha_meiswinkel , 

Thanks for reverting back. 
Getting this after using --verbose: 
POST https://xxxx.hana.ondemand.com/oauth/token
Request failed with message "self-signed certificate in certificate chain"
Access token cannot be refreshed. Is the refresh token available?
Failed to log in to your account using interactive OAuth authentication

Also, we have the detailed logs using 

set LOG_LEVEL=6

entry.title: Re: Crystal Reports 2020 connection issues
entry.content:
Try to install the Oracle Client (64bit option for CR 2020). Configure the Net Manager to connect to the Oracle database. Contacting your database admin or IT department might be necessary for the connection details.

Add a new Oracle Client connection by using the Edit menu, Create.

Add a new connection in CR from the Oracle Database option instead of the OLE DB (DAO).
Enter the Service Name [from the Oracle Client setup], userID and password.
The next time you connect, it will just ask for the password and autofill the userID.

Depending on your workstation's security setup, a call/ticket to your IT department may also be necessary to setup the connection(s) [due to the need for admin privileges].

Sidenote:
I have similar errors now when trying to use the Excel ODBC (DAO) connection.
I have [well, had...] a report that pulls data out and I would export it into an excel file that has been setup as an ODBC repository [basic CR 2016 export to ODBC]. Then, I load a second report and use that ODBC excel as a secondary data set [due to how the DB is configured].
This method broke after installing CR 2020. I have not found a solution yet.

- However, I have created a new connection using ODBC (RDO) to an excel file. This allows me to pull data from the Excel, but I still need to figure out how to push new data to the excel. Either updating or overwriting with current info, if possible. I'm not sure how to do that yet and might need to learn some additional SQL to see if this will even work.

entry.title: Re: @sap/datasphere-cli: Getting Rid of Passcodes Thanks to OAuth Client Support
entry.content:
Hi @Yash02,

Thanks for the information. Please check the troubleshooting guide at https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/faq-amp-troubleshooting-guide-for-sap-datasphere-cli/ba-p/13550029, it provides some guidance how to deal with this issue in detail.

Thanks!

entry.title: Tax Rebate u/s 87A is not getting calculated
entry.content:
Hi All,

As per the new budget of FY2025-26, we have applied changes mentioned in note 3569898. The tax slabs are working fine. However, tax rebate is not getting generated for employees with taxable income less than 12 lacs. Please help us resolve this at the earliest as we are close to payroll run of April.
Thank You!!

entry.content: 이 이미지를 잘못 복사하여 붙여넣으신 것 같다고 생각합니다.

entry.title: Re: Switching ALV on a dynpro container -> old ALV remain...
entry.content:
Hello,

I assume the problem is related to the lifetime/linkage of container-1 to the dynpro. The default lifetime is "lifetime_imode"; you can set this either to "lifetime_dynpro" (see parameter lifetime in the constructor) or use the link() method (see below).

Since you are using a custom container, the link is obviously not being released by calling the free( ) method, make sure you also freed the reference variable for container-1. If this doesn't work you can set the link using the link() method for container-2.

I would prefer to use only one container for both grids and setting the visibility of the two grids by calling set_visibility(true/false). The optimal solution, of course, depends on your use case. The proposed solution consumes more memory, as both grids are stored in memory. This can be a problem if both grids contain a lot of data.

I hope this was helpful.

Enjoy!

Aditya

entry.title: Re: SE71 Graphical Form Painter Error after SAP GUI 800 P...
entry.content:
Thanks for the feedback. The reference is in the SAP note 2221815 - SAPscript Legacy Text Editor controls are not packed in SAP Windows GUI Installation - SAP for Me: the reason is given:

"SAPscript Legacy Text Editor is an obsolete component and is replaced by "MS Word as SAPScript Text Editor" [...] SAP GUI for Windows Release 7.40 Compilation 2 (Patch 05) and higher will not contain the controls for SAPscript Legacy Text Editor [...] If you require SAPscript Legacy Text Editor and SAPscript Form Painter you should install the component [...] can be downloaded from SAP Software Download Center" (see the SAP note for more information).

entry.title: Re: SAP Advantage ODBC drivers
entry.content: I would be interested as well in these ODBC Advantage drivers. I can't find them on the SAP site anymore.

entry.title: Re: RELEASE STRATEGY PURCHASE REQUISITION
entry.content:
hello,

create new characteristic, name it lets say as Contract

In additional data choose Table CEKKO and Field KONNR

Tick box "Not ready for input"

Add it to your class type

Then you will have it in CL24N, it will be empty (without any value) there.

It means that the release will only trigger if KONNR in your purchase requisition will be empty.

entry.title: Print relevant flag in a class not considered in Production Order printout, still showing all chars
entry.content:
Variant class is set Maintained unchecked print relevant indicator, still production order printouts showing unchecked

 

 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Print relevant flag in a class not considered in Prod...
entry.content:
Please consider using the BADI BD_VCH_HL_PRINTING  for your requirement .

 

Please check the information from the online documentation at the link Output Management

 

All the valuated characteristics are included in the corresponding print document by default. If you would like to exclude certain characteristics and their values from being printed, you can implement the following BADI BD_VCH_HL_PRINTING

 

The CDS view I_ClfnClassCharcForKeyDate contains the field CharcIsPrintRelevant and is Released.

 

Documentation for the CDS view is  available at : https://api.sap.com/cdsviews/I_CLFNCLASSCHARCFORKEYDATE

 

Please consider calling this , within the BADI to check if the characteristic is relevant for printing

entry.title: Our e-invoicing strategy for suppliers on SAP Business Network
entry.content:
Many governments around the world have now realized that digitization offers many benefits, including speed, transparency and, when it comes to invoicing, improving tax compliance. Businesses everywhere see an increasing number of countries introducing e-invoicing or tax portals and regulatory mandates. It can’t be ignored that the invoicing landscape is globally going through a fundamental shift, and that compliance becomes the main argument for organizations in choosing their provider.

What does an e-invoicing mandate mean?

Each country has their own flavor of regulations, as they progress at different speeds in their domestic digitization and tax compliance journeys. Invoicing through a government portal has been a reality for almost two decades in Brazil, and Europe has been experiencing the same shift for a couple of years, with the introduction of SDI in Italy, NAV in Hungary, or PEPPOL for public sector throughout the EU, gradually becoming a mandatory part of the invoicing process.

An e-invoicing mandate can therefore mean many different things: a formatting standard, a compulsory reporting of invoices on a government portal, or even a fully integrated journey of invoice clearance and interoperability. In a nutshell, invoicing has become more complex, especially for companies operating across multiple jurisdictions. Our colleague Christoph Neumann covers some of these scenarios in a recent webcast.

Challenges for supplying organizations

In order to meet regulatory compliance requirements, companies need to remain up to date with constantly evolving regulations, and to integrate to local government portals or networks which often make their current e-invoicing solution redundant. For a supplier, it can become cumbersome to receive purchase orders in one portal but to invoice in the government-mandated one. That is inefficient and undermines the value of networks such as SAP Business Network.

 

Our strategy for the future

In continuous conversation with our customers, we have established a vision and a strategy, that we introduced in a previous post.

Beyond regulatory consistency, SAP Business Network aims to streamline business-to-business collaboration, transforming how companies work with their trading partners and tax authorities across the globe using SAP and partner apps.

To turn this vision into reality, four major innovations are planned to shape the future development of SAP Business Network:
First, we will become an open network by providing suppliers with a single access point for outbound invoicing to send legally compliant invoices to customers both on and outside of SAP Business Network.
Second, we want to enhance invoice dispute management with built-in, AI-powered workflows to reduce manual effort and offer faster resolution, to the benefit of both buyers and suppliers.
Next, we will enhance invoice status visibility with improved error rejection codes and reasons. This has been a recurring pain point for suppliers.
And lastly, we plan on reestablishing business rule validations for buyers.

In the future, suppliers will use SAP Business Network as a single provider to reach all their buyers, with the confidence that all country complexities and invoicing requirements are catered for. Reduced invoice dispute and enhanced visibility into errors or rejection reasons will offer a seamless e-invoicing experience and a single communication channel for suppliers and their customers.

SAP Business Network is leading the charge

For us at SAP, compliance is only the baseline. We have always followed the evolutions of tax and invoicing mandates and done our due diligence to remain compliant. Thus, the network is already compliant in countries that currently mandate the use of some government portal or where some particularities apply.

More importantly, SAP Business Network offers value beyond mere regulatory compliance: suppliers can count on its flexible, intuitive and robust capabilities to help them automate, optimize and grow their commerce. To name just a few:

  • a flexible offer to fit your needs with two account types and one subscription
  • an intuitive interface and an efficient PO-flip invoicing principle
  • visibility in invoice status and instant messaging for smooth customer communication
  • a robust profile with compliance and sustainability information
  • public and private electronic catalogs to promote products and services
  • unique business intelligence and peer-validated analytics to support strategic conversations
  • opportunities for growth with discoverability towards new buyers

With the current capabilities and commitment to our strategy, we are confident that the network will continue to be the solution of choice for all companies looking for strategic value beyond simple transactions.

For more information, read our e-invoicing strategy in details.

Stay tuned! Keep following us by subscribing to the SAP Business Network for Suppliers tag, by simply clicking the blue button on top of this page.

entry.title: Re: S4Cloud: Adobe Form - custom field hardcoded text not...
entry.content: Hi Fabienne - I finally did find the reason. This probably comes down to inexperience with xml. My field where the issue occurs resides in a subform, lets call it "Subform1". The field "Partner", which my field checks with, resides in another subform, let's call it "Subform2". Both subforms reside under the same main form, but "Subform1" isn't a parent to "Subform2". "Subform2" is hidden. I haven't yet studied the link you provided (not fluent enough in German, so it'll take some time), but I suppose my if(this.parent...) didn't work this way. When I moved the "Partner" data binding into "Subform1", it did work. It's confusing though that we have numerous other fields that also fetch data from "Subform2", and which are organized similarly in relation to "Subform2" as my field is, but which don't have the same issue. I have faced this often enough to have checked it in the past, so I still don't quite get why it was an issue now. Also, it's confusing that the logic of my field still clearly worked, just the value didn't get displayed. Anyhow, I thank you for your time and patience, for the very useful link and for validating that it wasn't the piece of javascript that caused it. That pushed me re-checking assumptions I already thought I had checked before.

entry.title: Re: Big memory consumption XSLT, why Heap is used? Best with ST.
entry.content:
Hi Sandra,

thank you.

In the output you can see the difference in the allocation sequence.

Dialog processes use up to 2000000000 EM and after that is used 2000000000 HEAP.
Background processes do it the other way round (first HEAP then EM).

So if you see a HEAP usage in dialog processes it means either the 2000000000 EM have been used up (or were not available anymore at that point in time)
and afterwards HEAP memory had to be used. HEAP is work process local memory which will be released after wp restart (we call that priv see
Private Memory, PRIV Memory (HEAP) | SAP Help Portal,

I would assume that during your XSLT transformation the available EM for dialog process is used up and HEAP is used. Maybe memory might be released 
after peak consumption (EM can go down) but HEAP will stay. I'm not sure if you could verify that with un unaggregated trace with memory activated in SAT
or with memory snapshots in memory inspector right after the transformation call. STATS as well should show you maximum extended memory usage during
execution (e.g.).

and now i'm mot sure anymore if the above is helpful for you... 😉

Kind regards,

Hermann

entry.title: Re: Scale Price in Fiori App / Scale Price Overview
entry.content:
Hello Jan, 

There are several options for choosing the right supplier / price.
In the Fiori app "Manage Purchasing Info Records", for example, you can filter by your material and compare the conditions of different suppliers. You can use filters to specify your search. (all in one tab)

There is also the Monitor Purchasing Info Record Price History app, where you can take a closer look at and compare price trends.

Another idea would be to rollout the Supplier Evaluation, which can access not only prices but also other supplier performance indicators so that you can make an informed decision when selecting suppliers.

I hope this helps you a little.

Best reagrds

Dennis

entry.title: Re: Bring SAP SuccessFactors Data into SAP Datasphere
entry.content:
Hi Lalit,

Great blog post series, thanks a lot!

Do you know, if there is a way to restrict the data read from Success Factors directly at API level, that means before the data is replicated into Datasphere? 

The reason I am asking this is that a customer wants to limit the number of fields of each table (projection) and the number of rows (filter) to make sure that no personally identifying information (PII) is ever available on SAP Datasphere.

Any thoughts on this?

Best regards,

Matthias

entry.title: Is there a way to enable ILX on the mobile app?
entry.content: We are going to enable the ILX as the default for our full LMS population with 1H2025. Is there a way to push this change on the mobile app without asking users to adjust their settings?

entry.title: Hiring manager recieving multiple emails_onboarding 2.0
entry.content: All of the new hire tasks assigned to hiring manager due to which multiple notifications are trigger to hiring manager like 1 per task, how to restrict the emails and have only 1 email to notify manager that there is a new member joining?

entry.title: Re: How to implement SAP BTP Audit log service in a CAP Application
entry.content:
Hey @youngzhong,

Thanks for your comment. Regarding your question -

1. Currently, I don't have much idea about mapping the auditLog instance in Kyma. I will check regarding the same and see if I find something good.

2. Audit logs are stored in the AuditLog Viewer service mentioned in the service instance subscription part of the blog with detail, which requires the role of AuditLog auditor, requiring two identifiers - 

  • auditlog-management!b*
  • auditlog-viewer!t*

You can refer to this link for a detailed implementation of the Audit log viewer service -https://help.sap.com/docs/btp/sap-business-technology-platform/audit-log-viewer-for-cloud-foundry-environment

entry.title: Re: Getting error while executing FAGLGVTR
entry.content: SAP only allows maximum two open fiscal years in Asset Accounting at a time, you can use T-code OAAQ to close the assets previous fiscal year and no depreciation is in planned it means all depreciation should be posted

entry.title: Re: 1H 2025 Release Highlights on SuccessFactors Learning Management System
entry.content: Thanks for sharing the details. It is much helpful and very informative.

entry.title: Re: Joule in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition - Setup Guide
entry.content:
Hi Nagesh,

I am thinking about one Integration with Joule, but wondering if this is now feasible.

There is already a set of solution and Fiori applications and purely hosted on BTP Cloud foundry. And now the launchpad and applications want to integrate with Joule.

I think the cloud identity service could handle well with Joule and applications and idP, etc.

How this could be injected or set up in frontend launchpad afterwards?

I saw your tutorials about Joule integrations mostly serves on the standard solution with Joule,

How is it for Joule to integrate with a customized apps and solutions? Is is possible now?

I guess the Joule works as a way as a plug-in, and maybe this scenario needs other coding or break-out?

Please correct me if I am wrong.

Thank you for your support!

Thanks, Roger

entry.title: Unable to Create Mobile Application in SAP Build – "Not Subscribed" Message
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

I'm currently following the tutorial "Create Your First MDK Application"  Create Your First MDK Application | SAP Tutorials on SAP BTP.
When I try to create a new application in SAP Build  (first step of Start Your MDK Application in the Editor Task, I see that the "Mobile" application type is not selectable and shows a message stating "Not Subscribed."

I'm using a trial subaccount, and I have already created an instance of Mobile Services and generated the service key. However, it seems that the Mobile Application type in SAP Build is not available due to the subscription status.

Could anyone clarify:

  • What exact subscription is required to enable the Mobile application type in SAP Build?

  • Is it available in trial accounts, or only in productive environments?

  • Are there any additional configurations or entitlements needed?

Thanks in advance for your help!
Davide Bruno

entry.title: Re: ACADEMIC LESSONS: Your roadmap to teaching with SAP Learning Hub, student edition in the classro
entry.content:
Dear @Heather_UA 

I just wanted to confirm that I now have access to the SAP Learning Hub – Student Edition.

Thank you very much for your assistance and support throughout the process. I truly appreciate your help in resolving the issue.

Best regards,

entry.title: Re: change of Session timeout settings ? Do you recommend ??
entry.content:
Dear Customer,

Thank you for reaching out. This is Hannah from SuccessFactors Employee Central Team.

Please check the KBA as below: 2088893 - How to define the Session timeout period and timeout warning period for SuccessFactors Platform

As the topic is owned by the Platform team and the Employee Central team has limited knowledge of it, it is recommended to direct any further questions to the Platform team.

 

Best regards,

Hannah

entry.title: Re: Error while trying to activate new SAP key
entry.content:
Hi Steffen,

I am completely doing guesswork here. I used to see similar emtpy error messages in the past and so far I could solve these issues by completely clearing the browser cache and loggin off and on again.

Did you check the logfiles under Monitor >>> Integrations and APIs >>> Access Logs >>> System Log Files maybe you can see something in there.
Update: I had issues with a p12 key pair used for a secure connection to one of our business partners today and I can find error messages for this in our system's log.

Best of luck!

Regards,
Mathias

entry.title: Re: The Evolution of SAP Data & Analytics is Accelerating!
entry.content:
Hi @RaminS !

Thank you for your perspective. I think SAP gave a pretty clear answer about the direction with SAP BDC. We will see how that works in the next months.

I know many customers, having a good reason to stay with SAP BW on prem. But I also think, we will see that less and less now. For many customers looking for the S/4HANA embedded analytics capabilities is an interesting aspect as SAP build in analytics based on HANA and enable SAC for direct access. But it is an embedded and operational approach and needs a clear picture about the individual need. Every data platform, BW, Datasphere, ... is a decision to a more strategic analytics approach, especially if you have multiple sources, beside S/4. Even SAP is pushing S/4 rather as core and is building new, typically cloud-based solutions around. But we can think about data fabric letting the data where it is. SAP Business Data Cloud leverage the One Domain Model to harmonize at least SAP Sources for this reason.

entry.title: Issue in activating Extended CDS View
entry.content:
Hi Team i am traying to extend the standard view NSDM_V_MARC.

My syntax is as below.

@AbapCatalog.sqlViewAppendName: 'YCL_COBL'
@EndUserText.label: 'Extension view for Append MM_APP_MSEG'
extend view NSDM_V_MARC with ZNSDM_V_MARC_EXT
{
zzdanger,
zztop_stock,
zzstabl,
zzplan,
zzrmatn,
zzdmatn,
zzimatn,
zzid_repa,
zzqs,
zznivq,
zzid_imma,
zzcd_gest,
zzdur_moy,
zzpomatnr
}

 

But while activating the same i am getting below error.

Internal exception raised (VIEW DEFINITION AND EXTEND DO NOT FIT TOGETHER )

Your help be really appreciated.

@ABAP @Hana @CDS

entry.title: Re: Email notification for Flexible workflow – Purchase Order

entry.title: Re: Big memory consumption XSLT, why Heap is used? Best with ST.
entry.content: @HermannGahm Your answers help me a lot to better understand memory consumption (e.g. RSMEMORY to show the difference between DIA and BGD memory strategy). I have added two animated GIF of MAXIMUM (if more source data is added, it would dump) memory consumption of XSLT versus ST via SM50, running in DIA processes. In this test, I realize that ST can consume Heap too, but I couldn't see it in my first test because ST consumes so little memory compared to XSLT. I'll check SAT, STATS and Memory Inspector tomorrow. My original question concerns the big difference between XSLT and ST, so I guess that @Ryan-Crosby answer points to the right direction (respectively random access versus serial access, i.e. maybe the source XML is parsed entirely and stored in memory before running XSLT).

entry.title: Re: SAP IQ Storage Allocation Explained and "why is my database full when I have free space&quo
entry.content:
Hello, @laurab2 !
Very reasonable question; did you find the solution for your question?
Thanks!

entry.title: Re: Consuming ODATA service in BODS
entry.content:
Hi Vinaya, thank you for the post. If I need to do the opposite, would it be the same dataflow?

Lets say my source is ECC and target is an ODATA table.

Usually in POSTMAN, a transaction ID is required.

What about BODS, how will the transaction ID be generated?

entry.title: Re: Transport Iflows between different packages in the same SAP Cloud Integration tenant
entry.content:
Sorry Eric, I missed that one 😞 

You can download the integration flow from the discovery section, the package is available in api.sap.com:

https://api.sap.com/package/de.whint.localtransports/integrationflow

Best regards, Adam

entry.title: Re: Changing Quota value in a Quota arrangement not apply...
entry.content:
Hello Jez

You can use the field Quota Base Quantity to compensate for the allocated quantity. 

Regards,
Caetano

you have to extend this cds, I believe.

entry.content: Does SAP S/4HANA Cloud for Billing and Revenue Innovation Management, private edition (BRIM), natively integrate with SAP DRC NF-e?

entry.title: Re: In my BTP trial account trust configuration option mi...

entry.title: SAC Thresholds, Compare to measure missing
entry.content:
Hi

Within a story I am trying to apply a threshold on a measure to apply conditional formatting depending on its value compared to another.

When creating  a threshold from the ribbon menu I can only create account based thresholds, I believe due to the model containing an account dimension. To get round this I select the measure header in a table and from the context menu (from right clicking) select thresholds here this allows a measure threshold but this does not allows a threshold where the measure is compared to another measure as shown below.

 

I should see this

entry.title: Re: Change created own overhead rate in costing sheet
entry.content:
Hi,

you cannot change the dependency when entering the overhead rate. You must delete the line and re-enter the correct dependency with the overhead rate, as each dependency has specific fields for the overhead rate.

Best regards,

Katerina

entry.title: Process not found Error - Build Process Automation Form
entry.content:
Hallo All

I have the issue below in both my trial account and development systems.

I have created an approval form and am trying to make changes to the notification form.

entry.title: Is it possible to create hierarchy variables in Datasphere/Analytical Model?
entry.content:
Dear all,

 

May I ask you if you have found a possibility to create variables containing hierarchies in SAP Datasphere? 
Users need to be able to select hierarchy nodes in SAC prompts - Otherwise they have to select hundreds of single values.

Thank you
Timo

entry.title: Instructor-led with online content - online content "preview" only
entry.content:
Hello all,

I have an instructor-led with online content item that is not working as expected. 

The expectation is that an employee registers for a class requiring approval, and after the approval they can access the online content. However, the online content section of the item details still only shows "content preview" for employees who are approved and actively enrolled in the class. 

"Unregistered User can Access Online Content" is off 
"Content available only during specified time slot of a class" is off
"Content is available for launch (available for users)" is on 

Thank you!

entry.title: Re: Instructor-led with online content - online content "preview" only
entry.content:
Also, at the content object level, "content object is active" is checked, and "content object is online" is checked.

If I duplicate the item as online only, the content is available and launches correctly.

entry.title: Secure 2.0 Section 603 Multiple Savings Plans
entry.content: We have a 401k plan and a 457 plan, and employees are allowed to contribute the maximum to both. The 457 plan has to consider both the EE contribution and the ER contribution when reaching the maximum ($23500) before catch-up can be triggered. All is working correctly currently, but when I ran some test cases for Section 603 requirements, the catch-up contribution for the 457 plan continues until the EE contribution reaches the maximum (not considering the ER contribution as it should). The 401k catch-up stops as expected based on how I have table VV_T5F99K2_US_BN603 configured. I think the issue is that we do not have the 457 plan marked as a Qualified Plan in V_5UBA_C. We are not able to mark both plans as Qualified Plans because our employees are allowed to contribute the maximum to both. If I mark them both as Qualified, the system considers the EE 401k plus the EE 457 when reaching the maximum, and that won't work for us. Does anyone have a recommendation as to how to meet the requirements of Section 603?

entry.title: Re: SAP Datasphere External Access Overview: APIs, CLI and SQL
entry.content:
Great job! One thing that drove me crazy with the CLI:

datasphere login

assumes you have chrome installed. If not, it will fail and you will not see why.

Use

datasphere login --browser edge

to make it work!

entry.title: FM (or other ways) to read layout input-field content from COOIS tcode
entry.content:
Hi SAP Gurus,

I searched into the forum without any success on this topic.

In my scenario I saved a variant in COOIS  list / Operations, let's say V1, which contains some selection-input filters (MRP personnel, plant, etc). Other than this, I also saved a layout using selection screen input field, let's say L1, containing some filters which will apply on my alv ouput, in specific I filtered only operation 0025 and 0035, so that for all production orders it will display these rows (in some other variants there can be other filters).

I'm able to read filters from variant, but I cannot find how to get layout filters. This is my starting code:

INITIALIZATION.
  p_syst1 = 'TECO'. "status Closed

START-OF-SELECTION.

      CALL FUNCTION 'RS_VARIANT_CONTENTS'
        EXPORTING
          report               = 'PPIO_ENTRY'
          variant              = 'V1' 
        TABLES
          valutab              = lt_rsparams

"Exclude TECO status
      CLEAR: ls_rsparams.
      LOOP AT lt_rsparams INTO ls_rsparams 
                          WHERE selname = 'P_SYST1'.
        lv_tabix = sy-tabix.
        ls_rsparams-sign = 'E'.
        ls_rsparams-option = 'EQ'.
        ls_rsparams-low = p_syst1.
        MODIFY lt_rsparams FROM ls_rsparams INDEX lv_tabix.
      ENDLOOP.

     lt_parameters[] = lt_rsparams[].

"Prepare only Operation List to read
      ls_tcoa-oper_sel   = abap_true.

      CALL FUNCTION 'COIS_SELECT_PARAMETERS_SET'
        EXPORTING
          it_parameter = lt_parameters
          is_tcoa      = ls_tcoa.       

      CALL FUNCTION 'COIS_SELECT_ORDERS_READ'
        CHANGING
          ct_iooper = lt_iooper.


"Here I need to include filters contained in L1 layout
"to further filter IOOPER table otherwise I get all fields 
"without any filter

      MOVE-CORRESPONDING lt_iooper[] TO lt_out1[].

I tried with the followings snippets without any success:

DATA(lo_variant) = cl_salv_bs_variant=>get_instance( ).
DATA(ls_layout)  TYPE salv_s_layout.

TRY.
    lo_variant->set_report( 'PPIO_ENTRY' ).
    lo_variant->set_layout( 'L1' ).
    ls_layout = lo_variant->read_data( ).
    DATA(lt_filters) = ls_layout-filters.
  CATCH cx_salv_bs_sc_runtime_info INTO DATA(e).
    " Errore nella lettura del layout
ENDTRY.

 And this:

DATA: lt_ltdx TYPE TABLE OF ltdx,
      lv_variant TYPE rlgrap-filename.

SELECT * INTO TABLE lt_ltdx
  FROM ltdx
  WHERE report = 'PPIO_ENTRY'
    AND handle = ''
    AND variant = 'L1'.

IF sy-subrc = 0.
  " Deserialize error
  IMPORT layout = ls_layout
         filters = lt_filter
         FROM DATA ls_ltdx-xlayout ID 'LAY'.

  LOOP AT lt_filter INTO ls_filter.
   
  ENDLOOP.

ENDIF.

In this last case I can't deserialize information from LTDX table and also I don't have any XSTRING or RAW data element in its strucutre, in fact lt_filter is EMPTY.

 

Do you have any clue or advise on this?

I'm in S/4.

Requesting your kind help

thanks

entry.title: Re: Step-by-Step Migration: From SAP Web IDE (Neo) to BAS (CF)
entry.content:
Hi @ianzheng ,

Thank you for your comment. I’m glad you found the article helpful!

Regarding your query about ABAP destination creation, I currently do not have a specific guide on this topic. However, you can refer to the SAP documentation, which provides detailed guidance for such configurations. Here's a useful resource you might find relevant: https://help.sap.com/docs/connectivity/sap-btp-connectivity-cf/destination-examples?locale=en-US#loio3a2d57580d474da6960a644462a92861__http_op

If you have any further questions or need assistance, feel free to reach out.

Best regards,
Santhosh

entry.title: SAP C4C - Badi for Incoming Address Deletion Request
entry.content:
Hi All,

since we have the problem, that Business Partner Adresses cannot be deleted as long as they are used by Contacts I was wondering whether I can reassign another valid address to Contact in order to make the address deletable.

As the data comes in from SAP ERP via CPI, there is no use of a manual process. The SAP ERP is the data source for Business Partners and their adresses. Contacts on the other hand are creatred in C4C and are not replicated to SAP ERP. But they inherit their address from the Business Partner Object.

This leads to error messages like "You are not allowed to delete this address." when a Business Partner gets updated and a address is deleted.

So the idea is to fix this by reassigning the Business Partners new main address to the Contact so deletion is possible. The only point I am missing is: Where can I hook in in the replication process to witness the address deletion before its magic is done.

I already have implemented enhancements in SAP C4C like RecipientSystemDeterminationbyBuinessObject to avoid unwelcomed replication. So I am searching for a similar process to "correct" the address in there.

Kind regards,
Manu

entry.title: Re: SAP Landscape Management Cloud discontinued
entry.content:
@Marco_Dorn How will the stop/start automation be provided (which LAMA is doing perfectly for us on premise) in the cloud, if at all we decide to move to cloud? Do Azure or AWS have a similar feature?

If we decide to stick on premise beyond 2027, can we still use our LAMA for automation till we move to cloud?

entry.title: Re: Iflow HTTP Oauth authentication unsupported grant typ...
Re: #SITCPS2025 O Fim da TAXBRA/RVABRA e a Chegada do TaaS: Tudo o Que Você Precisa Saber
entry.content: Dezen é fera!

entry.title: Re: Secure 2.0 Section 603 Multiple Savings Plans
entry.content:
Hi @Debbie_Moses ,

You're absolutely on point, the core of the issue lies in how the system treats the 457 plan contributions under Section 603. Here's what you can consider:

Marking both the 401(k) and 457 as "Qualified Plans" in V_5UBA_C causes the system to sum EE contributions across both plans which isn't what you want.

What’s happening:

  • 401(k) catch-up is working fine because VV_T5F99K2_US_BN603 is correctly configured.

  • 457 plan is incorrectly triggering catch-up based only on EE contributions, ignoring ER contributions, since it’s not marked as a Qualified Plan  and that flag is what controls the inclusion of ER in the catch-up calculation.

Recommended workaround:

  • Don't mark both plans as Qualified in V_5UBA_C.

  • Instead, create a custom rule or enhancement in the Benefits BAdI (e.g. BADI_FBN_CONTRIBUTION_LIMIT) that handles the 457 plan catch-up separately and Manually includes both EE + ER contributions when applying the $23,500 limit before catch-up.

This lets you: ✔ Keep 401(k) logic intact.
✔ Avoid the system summing contributions incorrectly.
✔ Enforce ER+EE cap for the 457 plan as required.

for SAP Help Reference: Configure Contribution Limits
(Search for Section 603 and catch-up contributions for relevant info)

if this answered your question, please mark the response accordingly. Thank you

entry.title: Re: SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition Finance, SAP S/4HANA...
entry.content:
The difference in reporting is that project costs are internally calculated for Customer Projects, but for Enterprise Projects they are uploaded with values only, not quantities.

You will have to develop a custom report to report on quantities on Enterprise Projects.  Enterprise Project cost planning is uploaded (quantities are not available to upload, only values).  You could get plan quantities from Project Demands and then layer in the actual quantities.

entry.title: Re: Iflow HTTP Oauth authentication unsupported grant typ...
entry.content:
Hi,

Maybe you can type a star on fields Scope, Resource and Audience.

Kind regards

entry.title: Re: Mass creation of Project and WBS element using odata
entry.content:
Go to API.SAP.COM and search for project APIs.  

https://api.sap.com/search?searchterm=project&tab=APIs&$refinedBy=true&$type=(%22API%22,%22API%20Package%22)

entry.title: Unable to find field in OData Service Explorer
entry.content: So I've created a custom OData Service for Service Requests and I'm having a hard time finding the 'Category' field. I've tried adding every option I can think of to the service and have been using postman to send payloads with every field filled in but none of them relate to the 'Category' field. I've noticed that the fields in the custom service sometimes differ from the standard service as well so I can't just copy the payload for the standard service that works and use it in the custom service. I'm in the middle of reading a bunch of documentation to see if I can find any answers but does any one have any advice for finding the 'Category' field in the OData Service Explorer so that I can use it in the custom service? TIA.

entry.title: Re: Build Process Automation subscription is failing again!

entry.title: Re: Changing my universal ID from S USER to P USER
entry.content:
@Joerom For Universal ID support, please reach out to our Customer Interaction Center, they can help you: https://support.sap.com/en/contact-us.html?anchorId=section_42886245

They will, however, not be able to help you retrieve your certifications. (I believe)
I therefore recommend you contact SAP Learning support after you have changed your Universal ID: https://learning.sap.com/helpcenter

entry.title: Build process automation subscription failed in trial account
entry.content:
Unable to add the SAP Build process automation to my sub account instance, even though i added SAP BUILD PROCESS AUTOMATION Entitlements to my Subaccount. I tried to add many times by deleting sub account and again creating subaccount, but the same problem exists here.

The following is the details of my US account.

It is giving the response, couldn't subscribe to SAP Build Process Automation. Try again. If the problem persists, please post a question to SAP Community.

SAP America Inc.,
3999 West Chester Pike,
Newtown Square,
PA, USA

entry.title: Re: The Transition from SAP GTS 11 to SAP GTS, edition for SAP HANA
entry.content: Can I get the list of FIORI apps available for GTS E4H (SAP HANA 2023) ? In the reference library all the FIORI apps related to GTS are not updated.

entry.title: SAP TM Enhancement Report to check TOR data
entry.content:
SAP TM Enhancement Report to check TOR data

SAP Transportation Management (TM) delivery some standards report to review TM Objects also the BOBF -Business Object Processing Framework, transactions in SAP to check and execute different action within TM objects, i.e one of the previous blog: SAP TM BOPF Navigator -Transaction /SCMTMS/BONAV - SAP Community

The report /SCMTMS/TOR_MODEL_DESCR is available in SAP TM to check the TOR data along with some BOBF Nodes in the structure like Item Level, head Level, Stops, BPs, etc.

This report is flexible to execute by User, Range of dates, Document Category, Document Type also with Document Number and Internal Key TM objects.

 

Also, some Technical settings and possible to save as variants:

Once you execute the report you can see the TM Nodes on left side and right side each line related with the TM Documents:

 

For example, like see the BP at FU Level:

This report gives a quickly overview of the TM Nodes and easy navigate through.

Refer to:

3586175 - Enhancement for report /SCMTMS/TOR_MODEL_DESCR - SAP for Me

3559480 Enhancements for TOR Check Report
3559026 Enhancement of report to display TOR data
3557888 Abort of Report /SCMTMS/TOR_MODEL_DESCR
3480188 Main Cargo Item flag is set incorrectly
3476950 Self Check Extension
3408472 TOR Self Check Extension
3351482 Extension of report /SCMTMS/TOR_MODEL_DESCR
3342545 Extension of report /SCMTMS/TOR_MODEL_DESCR
3322934 Extend TOR Check Report with Change Document Info
3071406 Wrong data shown within debugger script /SCMTMS/DS_TOR_MODEL_DESCR
3057939 Extension of debugger script /SCMTMS/DS_TOR_MODEL_DESCR
3053162 Missing debugger script to display current TOR data in a readable format

Hope this help you!

Thank you and regards.

Rogerio Lima.
